description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service and global variables ARG_ARCH=amd64, ARG_BASEIMG=ubuntu, ARG_BASEVERS=focal, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay. Add a job named build:amd64 that runs in the default stage, executes before_script commands 'apk add --no-cache curl gzip bash' and 'docker login -u "gitlab-ci-token" -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY"', then runs './scripts/unifi-build.sh -c stable -e latest -g "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi"', './scripts/unifi-publi.sh -c stable -e latest -g "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi"', './scripts/unifi-build.sh -c oldstable -g "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi"', './scripts/unifi-publi.sh -c oldstable -g "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi"', './scripts/unifi-build.sh -c unifi-8.2 -t lts -g "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi"', and './scripts/unifi-publi.sh -c unifi-8.2 -t lts -g "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi"', and runs only on the master branch. Add a job named build:dev:amd64 that also runs in the default stage, runs before_script commands 'apk add --no-cache curl gzip', 'export VERSION_UNIFI="$(./scripts/ci-get-unifi-version.sh ${UNIFI_CHANNEL})"', and 'docker login -u "gitlab-ci-token" -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" $CI_REGISTRY', then builds a Docker image with 'docker build --pull --build-arg stable -t "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi:dev-${VERSION_UNIFI}-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" .'', tags it with 'docker tag "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi:dev-${VERSION_UNIFI}-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi:dev-latest"', pushes both tags with 'docker push "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi:dev-${VERSION_UNIFI}-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"' and 'docker push "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/unifi:dev-latest"', and runs on all branches except master, oldstable, and testing. Both jobs use the docker tag and run on runners with the docker tag.
